channel.title: Arcane City Events - Next 14 Days
channel.description: Upcoming Arcane City events from 2026-05-30 through the next 14 days.

item.title: [05/30] C.Scott – Phase 2 Album Release Party @ Trace Brewing
item.description:
C.Scott celebrates the release of his new album 'Phase 2' with live sets, DJ sets, vinyl sales, and a food truck at Trace Brewing in Bloomfield.

Venue: Trace Brewing

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/30] Brood, Deadsky, Death Gasp, Complete Fucker, Grassy Knoll, Victim In Pain - Bill Chamberlain Memorial & Benefit @ Shred Shed
item.description:
Memorial and benefit show featuring Deadsky, Death Gasp, Complete Fucker, and Victim In Pain at Shred Shed.

Venue: Shred Shed

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/30] The Grand Duke's Fete @ Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center
item.description:
The Grand Duke's Fete A Monte Carlo Night Fundraiser

Venue: Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/30] Citizen Soldier: Secret Songs Tour II @ Thunderbird
item.description:
An intimate acoustic evening with Citizen Soldier at Thunderbird Music Hall on May 30th.

Venue: Thunderbird

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/30] Dillstradamus: Dillon Francis b2b Flosstradamus @ Roxian Theater
item.description:
Dillon Francis and Flosstradamus go b2b as Dillstradamus at the Roxian.

Venue: Roxian Theater

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: [05/30] An Abstract Garfield Pride Afterparty w/ Fatboi Sharif & Icky Reels @ Frechard Gallery
item.description:

Venue: Frechard Gallery

item.title: [05/30] Jellyfish Pride 2026 @ Spirit
item.description:
Jellyfish celebrates Pride with a night of DJs and live performances on Saturday, May 30, 2026.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/30] Darkroom @ Side Quest
item.description:
A dark industrial and synth-pop club night at Sidequest featuring DJs spinning Nine Inch Nails, Soft Cell, and Depeche Mode with performances by Faerie Fey, Krass Advert, and Cryptid Yinzer.

Venue: Side Quest

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/31] Pittsburgh Record Fest @ Spirit
item.description:
Pittsburgh's favorite vinyl record fair returns to Spirit for a day of digging through lots of vinyl and more.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/31] Backyard Battle of the Bags Cornhole Tournament @ Cobblehaus Brewing Company
item.description:
Get ready for an afternoon of bags, brews, and bragging rights!

Venue: Cobblehaus Brewing Company

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/31] Disco Sunday Disco @ Trace Brewing
item.description:
A free open-air disco dance party featuring DJs Hoagie Dreams, C. Scott, Miss Mungo, and Mat Fink at Clement Way Graffiti Alley in Lawrenceville.

Venue: Trace Brewing

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [05/31] Songs of Solidarity @ WBU Event Venue
item.description:
a night of songs &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; poetry benefitting mutual aid fund our streets collective

Venue: WBU Event Venue

Venue: Roboto Project

item.title: [06/01] Cani Sciorri with Danny Tantrum, Hedonia Bell, Blood Noize, Mother Stellar Hagstone & DJ Crystallized Organism @ Gallery AFK
item.description:
Liquid Electric Recordings presents Italian experimental act Cani Sciorri alongside a lineup of local and touring artists at Gallery AFK in Braddock, PA.

Venue: Gallery AFK

item.title: [06/01] Triiipgod & Friends @ Remedy
item.description:
Triiipgod hosts a night of electronic music with Feels, Low End Frequency, and Macho Bro at Remedy in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Remedy

item.title: [06/02] The Lycan with Lysandra, Shadow of Corvus, Feast Upon the Fallen & The Apotrope @ The Government Center
item.description:
A heavy metal showcase headlined by The Lycan at The Government Center in Pittsburgh, PA.

Venue: The Government Center

item.description:

item.title: [06/02] La Cerca with Other Local Acts @ Needle
item.description:
Desert-psych and shoegaze band La Cerca from Tucson, AZ plays Needle &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Bean with Pittsburgh local acts.

Venue: Needle

item.title: [06/03] Ten Million PSI @ Roboto Project
item.description:

Venue: Roboto Project

item.description:

item.title: [06/03] Matador Bolero @ Glitter Box Theater (Homestead)
item.description:
Pittsburgh screening of 'Matador Bolero,' a film by Jonathan Rosado starring Kansas Bowling and Yves Tumor, with 16mm grindhouse trailers presented by Flea Market Films.

Venue: Glitter Box Theater (Homestead)

item.description:

item.title: [06/05] Three Rivers Arts Festival @ Arts Landing
item.description:
Pittsburgh's beloved free annual arts festival returns to Arts Landing with arts, food, and live music over two weekends in June.

Venue: Arts Landing

item.description:

item.description:
